header.description: Runs the workflow when an n8n generated webchat is submitted

public.description: Whether the chat should be publicly available or only accessible through the manual chat interface

hostedChat.description: Chat on a page served by n8n

webhook.description: Chat through a widget embedded in another page, or by calling a webhook

hostedChatNotice.displayName: Chat will be live at the URL above once this workflow is published. Live executions will show up in the ‘executions’ tab

embeddedChatNotice.displayName: Follow the instructions here to embed chat in a webpage (or just call the webhook URL at the top of this section). Chat will be live once you publish this workflow

basicAuth.description: Simple username and password (the same one for all users)

n8nUserAuth.description: Require user to be logged in with their n8n account

initialMessages.description: Default messages shown at the start of the chat, one per line

availableInChat.displayName: Make Available in n8n Chat Hub
availableInChat.description: Whether to make the agent available in n8n Chat Hub for n8n instance users to chat with

availableInChatNotice.displayName: Your n8n users will be able to use this agent in Chat once this workflow is published. Make sure to share this workflow with at least Project Chat User access to all users who should use it.

agentIcon.description: The icon of the agent on n8n Chat

agentName.description: The name of the agent on n8n Chat. Name of the workflow is used if left empty.

agentDescription.description: The description of the agent on n8n Chat

allowFileUploads.description: Whether to allow file uploads in the chat

allowedFilesMimeTypes.description: Allowed file types for upload. Comma-separated list of MIME types.

allowedOrigins.description: Comma-separated list of URLs allowed for cross-origin non-preflight requests. Use * (default) to allow all origins.

inputPlaceholder.description: Shown as placeholder text in the chat input field

loadPreviousSession.description: If loading messages of a previous session should be enabled

notSupported.description: Loading messages of previous session is turned off

showWelcomeScreen.displayName: Require Button Click to Start Chat
showWelcomeScreen.description: Whether to show the welcome screen at the start of the chat

getStarted.description: Shown as part of the welcome screen, in the middle of the chat window

subtitle.description: Shown at the top of the chat, under the title

title.description: Shown at the top of the chat

customCss.description: Override default styling of the public chat interface with CSS

responseMode.description: When and how to respond to the chat

lastNode.description: Returns data of the last-executed node

streaming.description: Streaming response from specified nodes (e.g. Agents)

responseNodes.description: Send responses to the chat by using one or more Chat nodes
